utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 items. Now check if each is fully specified with all details requested by the format: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (name, location, bedrooms/bathrooms, square footage, features, price) — fully specified.
- financing: includes a financing solution with terms (solution type, loan amount, interest rate range, loan term, arrangement fee) — sufficiently specified as terms.
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (package and cost) — specified, but the user task also asked to include property surveys; the required format does not explicitly require surveys, so for format compliance this is acceptable.
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (package and cost) — specified.
- setup_services: utility and setup services (package and cost) — specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (property price, services fees total, grand total) — specified. 
All 6 items are present and contain the necessary details per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes selections from purchase_properties, purchase_financing, legal_administrative (essential_legal_services), moving_setup_services (moving_services), and moving_setup_services (utility_setup).
